title: Azure AD sso issue
excerpt: Hello, I have configured SSO with our IDP, Azure AD but I am receiving an error message when trying to login, “Doesn’t match issuer, expected but was”.   Support isn’t really reaching back out.   Our IDP is Azure Ad and …

posts.author: aspiretoinspire7 (Eddie Sardinha)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I have configured SSO with our IDP, Azure AD but I am receiving an error message when trying to login, “Doesn’t match issuer, expected but was”. Support isn’t really reaching back out. Our IDP is Azure Ad and we use saml2.

Anyone experience this?

Thanks

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @aspiretoinspire7, could you private message me your email or write it here? I’d like to track down the support ticket you wrote in about and see if we can assist further/what happened.

In the meantime, can you please check with the Admins of your account and see if they are able to go into the SSO provider and assign/add you to the monday.com account?
